overall.description: A atmospheric night walk through a foggy cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), following characters through neon-lit sidewalks, crossing wide intersections with massive digital billboards, and traversing industrial walkways and narrow alleys with vibrant purple and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to busy street with neon storefronts

events.description: black car with bright headlights passes by on the right side of the street
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing a bright pink and black jacket through the foggy sidewalk, maintaining steady pace behind them

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink jacket with hood walking steadily ahead of camera

entered.detail: tall building with green neon accent lighting along the edges
metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the street
illuminated advertisement display showing colorful graphics
tall black pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night sidewalk flanked by a neon-lit building on the left and a street railing on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian in a pink jacket as they walk past a digital bus stop advertisement. A black car passes by on the street, and the scene approaches an intersection with visible traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow striped crosswalk and massive digital billboards

events.description: exits covered sidewalk onto open street intersection with wide crosswalk
black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right
turns right while crossing toward the large TENGU building entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while following the pink jacket pedestrian toward the large illuminated TENGU sign

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights illuminated
pedestrian in pink jacket continuing across the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: massive building facade with large pink neon TENGU signage and food advertisement billboard
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on asphalt
orange metal guard rails along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection dominated by the massive TENGU building with its bright pink neon signage. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing orange safety barriers as a black sedan drives through. The foggy atmosphere diffuses the neon lights from the surrounding digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with purple atmospheric lighting and concrete barriers

events.description: enters industrial walkway with purple neon lighting and switches to following a new character in blue tank top and yellow pants
passing through dense purple fog and lighting effects creating atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: following a character wearing a blue tank top and yellow pants through the industrial elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: character in blue tank top and yellow pants walking ahead through the walkway

entered.detail: ground-mounted purple lights creating thick atmospheric fog effects
yellow and black striped concrete barriers blocking off areas
metal safety railings along the edge of the elevated walkway
raised concrete platform with LOOK LEFT painted on the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an industrial elevated walkway bathed in vibrant purple atmospheric lighting. The camera now follows a different character in a blue tank top and yellow pants as they navigate past concrete barriers and metal railings. The thick fog diffuses the purple lights, creating a moody, cyberpunk atmosphere distinct from the previous street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with red neon signage and scattered pedestrians

events.description: enters narrow alleyway illuminated by intense red neon lights and signage
passing by groups of NPCs standing near doorways and alley entrances

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley passing various pedestrians and NPCs standing near building entrances with red neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near a doorway illuminated by red neon lighting

entered.detail: bright red neon strip lights and vertical signage mounted on building walls
tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating narrow corridor
illuminated entryways with green and red neon lights marking doors
trash bags and scattered objects along the alley edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow, enclosed alleyway bathed in intense red neon light. The camera moves past building walls covered in red signage and illuminated doorways. Various NPCs stand near the entrances, and debris is scattered along the concrete ground. The atmosphere is dense and moody, with the red lighting creating a stark contrast to the previous purple-lit industrial area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from a neon-lit street to a moody, enclosed alleyway. It begins on a misty sidewalk, following a pedestrian in a pink jacket past a digital bus stop and a passing black car toward a busy intersection. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, the scene opens up to reveal the massive TENGU building with its bright pink signage and diffused digital billboards. The environment then shifts upward onto an industrial elevated walkway, where the lighting turns a vibrant purple as the camera follows a character in a blue tank top past concrete barriers. Finally, the path narrows into a dense alleyway bathed in intense red neon light, moving past illuminated doorways and scattered debris to conclude in a stark, moody atmosphere.
